title: ferray-polynomial: no fromroots constructor
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's polynomial classes have a fromroots(roots) classmethod that constructs the polynomial with the given roots. ferray-polynomial has roots() (root-finding) but no inverse operation. fromroots is useful for constructing interpolation polynomials, filter design, and testing. Implementation: for power basis, expand (x - r1)(x - r2)...(x - rn) via convolution. For other bases, construct in power basis and convert.
